Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover

Class TypeChecker

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.TypeChecker
public class TypeChecker extends Object
Encapsulates all the verifications to be made to ensure that a rule can safely be applied to a sequent in terms of well-formedness and type-checking. TODO Rodin 3.0: Take advantage of improved AST library
